title: TerracareLedgerEntry
description: Canonical schema for every entry in the Terracare on-device sovereign ledger (terracare_ledger in localStorage)

entry.description: Sequential entry number in the user's ledger chain (1-indexed)

tokenId.description: NFT token ID (present on NFT_MINT entries)

amount.description: Pollen amount (present on POLLEN_EARN / POLLEN_SPEND entries)

contentId.description: Content identifier (present on CONTENT_POST / CONTENT_VIDEO entries)

platforms.description: Platforms this entry is visible on: oriana, messenger, pollen

hash.description: SHA-256 hash of this entry for chain integrity verification
